---
title: "Outputs"
toc: false
---

This page gathers public-facing outputs from AD-Genomics-Cardiff. Replace the
placeholders below with specific records as team outputs are ready to list.

## Publications

- Placeholder publication citation  
- Placeholder preprint or manuscript citation  

---

## Talks & posters

- Placeholder conference talk or seminar  
- Placeholder poster or workshop presentation  

---

## Software, data & other resources

- **Placeholder repository or pipeline:** Brief description and link  
- **Placeholder dataset or analysis resource:** Brief description and link  

---

## Team updates and other outputs

- Placeholder report, briefing, or training material  
- Placeholder shared protocol, dashboard, or community resource
